name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans Gallatin, Tennessee — TitleMax offers same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using vehicle titles as collateral, plus uns...
description_long:
TitleMax is an established title loan provider that has served the Memphis area since February 2007. The Summer Avenue location (3190 Summer Avenue, Memphis, TN 38112) is one of several branches in the region, conveniently located one mile west of Highland Street near Auto Zone. The company operates extended hours Monday-Friday (9am-7pm most days) and Saturday (9am-4pm), with bilingual staff available.

TitleMax offers three primary products: (1) Title Pledges—secured loans using your vehicle title as collateral while keeping the vehicle; (2) Flex Line of Credit—a secured line of credit also tied to your vehicle title, allowing customers to withdraw funds all at once or over time up to their credit limit; and (3) Unsecured Personal Loans—online and in-store flexible lines of credit not requiring collateral. All products are designed for fast approval and same-day cash access. The company accepts most credit types and focuses on the vehicle's value and borrower's repayment ability rather than credit score alone.

Key distinguishing factors include competitive rate positioning, approval of most credit types despite performing credit checks, and the flexibility to keep your vehicle while using it as collateral for title-based products. The Memphis TN 9 location maintains exceptionally high customer ratings (5.00/5 average across 481+ Google reviews) with specific praise for individual staff members like Nicole, Joyce, and Johnathan who are repeatedly mentioned for professionalism, knowledge, and helpfulness.

The primary caveat is that title-based products are secured loans, meaning failure to repay could result in vehicle loss. Interest rates and fees are not disclosed on the website. Unsecured personal loans have state restrictions (available in AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI only). Like all title loan companies, TitleMax operates in a high-risk lending space that can trap borrowers in debt cycles if not carefully managed.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title pledges and lines of credit
Accepts most credit types—does not rely solely on credit score for approval
Keep your vehicle while using title as collateral for secured loans
Flexible line of credit options allowing withdrawal all at once or over time up to credit limit
Extended hours (until 7pm weekdays, open Saturdays) for working customers
Bilingual staff available at this location
Exceptional customer satisfaction with 5.00/5 average rating across 481+ reviews
Both in-store and online application options available
cons: Title pledge loans are secured by vehicle—default risks vehicle repossession
Interest rates, fees, and APR not disclosed on website; requires direct inquiry
Unsecured personal loans limited to 10 states only; not available nationwide
No specific information provided about repayment terms, loan amounts, or typical rates
High-cost lending product that can create debt cycles if borrowers cannot repay quickly
best_for: Consumers with vehicles and poor/fair credit who need immediate cash and can repay quickly
Self-employed or gig workers without traditional credit history who have a clear title vehicle
Borrowers in emergency situations willing to accept vehicle-backed collateral for faster approval
Tennessee residents specifically seeking in-person lending with extended weekday/Saturday hours
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Tennessee residents with vehicles and imperfect credit who need emergency cash within hours and can repay within weeks or months. The main caveat is that title-based products put your vehicle at risk if you cannot repay, and the lack of transparent rate/fee disclosure online means actual costs require in-person or phone inquiry before committing.
services: Title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (secured by vehicle title, flexible withdrawal)
Separate customer portals for title loans, online personal loans, and in-store personal loans
Credit checks and vehicle valuation assessment
Line of credit management with flexible repayment options
